description: Create a statics diagram of an L-shaped beam with vertices (0,0), (6,0), (6,2), (2,2), (2,8), and (0,8) to determine its Center of Mass and equilibrium suspension angle. Identify the global Centroid G and construct a plumb line passing through the Suspension Point S (0,8) and G. Measure the angle between the vertical edge (x=0) and this suspension line. Save the project as 'l_shape_statics.ggb' in ~/Documents/GeoGebra/projects/.
